subcodes.first_line: ...The line of progress is perpendicular and it has no end. Progress is infinite but there are many degrees. Each animate or inanimate organism advances along its own degree.
subcodes.subjects: @progress only takes place within its own degree, @spiritual transformation, @all things are in motion; kinds of motion, @power of the Manifestation of God, @essential distinction of Manifestation of God from others, @Manifestation of God as educator
